name: Kumulos
description: Mobile app engagement platform with built-in analytics, push notifications and attribution across the app journey.

seo.title: Kumulos — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Kumulos: Mobile app engagement platform with built-in analytics, push notifications and attribution across the app journey.

when_to_use: Push notifications + in-app messaging with built-in attribution for mobile apps
Mobile engagement platform tracking user journey from install to conversion
App analytics and behavioral segmentation integrated with push campaign delivery
Unified mobile engagement dashboard combining attribution and messaging

pros: Engagement features plus analytics and attribution together
Push notifications built into the same SDK
Reasonable pricing for SMB app teams
cons: Not a Tier-1 MMP in terms of partner depth
Brand visibility low compared with Braze or CleverTap
Attribution capabilities lighter than dedicated MMPs
Ownership changes have created roadmap uncertainty
review.verdict: Decent bundled engagement plus light attribution for SMB apps, but not the pick for serious UA measurement.
review.best_for: SMB app teams wanting push, analytics and basic attribution in one affordable SDK.
review.not_for: Performance-driven UA teams needing a full MMP and deep partner catalog.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
